news.t: S&P 500 Momentum Continued Its Dominant Run in May

holdings.infoBox: FDMO is an equity ETF with a total of 142 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.83%, Apple at 7.00%, Alphabet at 5.65%, Amazon.com at 3.42%, and Micron Technology at 3.32%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Momentum Factor ETF (FDMO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity U.S. Momentum Factor index. The fund tracks an index large-cap US stocks selected for positive momentum signals. FDMO was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: S&P 500 Momentum Continued Its Dominant Run in May
data.text: Physics tells us that something in motion stays in motion. With a month-to-date gain of 7.4% for momentum, according to data from S&P Global, other style-box factors essentially got out of momentum's ...
